name: Chili Non Carne (Meatless Chili)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.
2. Mix in chili powder, basil, oregano, and cumin.
3. Stir in zucchini and carrots until well blended. Cook about 1 minute over low heat, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain and chop tomatoes. Stir in chopped tomatoes, undrained kidney beans, and drained kidney beans; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 30-45 minutes or until thick.
6. Top with chopped onions or green peppers.
